retrieved_result: About the Refuge Around the Refuge Get Involved The refuge draws a lot of strength and support from our volunteers. People have contributed a couple hours a month to nearly a hundred hours a month. Every piece counts to make a refuge whole. Check out the Get Involved page to learn about ways to volunteer at the refu
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses volunteering at a refuge and has no relevance to API integration or debugging.
